name: Database Backup or Compressed File Uploaded to a Publicly Accessible Folder
notes:
This rule triggers when a database backup or a compressed file is uploaded to a publicly accessible folder or bucket. The Publicly Accessible Folders reference set must be populated with the relevant folder names. 

Note: The Critical File Extensions reference set is pre-populated with critical file extensions, and can be tuned.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Upload Events
when any of File Directory (custom), Storage Name (custom) are contained in any of Publicly Accessible Folders - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when any of File Extension (custom) are contained in any of Critical File Extensions - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY Database Backup or Compressed File Uploaded to a Publicly Accessible Folder on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Upload Events
AND when any of File Directory (custom), Storage Name (custom) are contained in any of Publicly Accessible Folders - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND when any of File Extension (custom) are contained in any of Critical File Extensions - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: A Database Backup or a Compressed File Has Been Uploaded to a Publicly Accessible Folder
Event description: Detects when a database backup or a compressed file is uploaded to a publicly accessible folder or bucket.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
